name: A survey of FPGA and ASIC designs for transformer inference
snippet: This study investigates and analyzes the model compression methods, various optimization techniques, and architectures of accelerators related to FPGA- and ASIC-based transformer designs. We expect this study to serve as a valuable guide for hardware research in the transformer field.
